manufacturer_from_details: ‎ Yangzhou Hongwei Sports Goods Co., Ltd
features: Superior Ankle Support: Our ankle support provides optimal stability, making it ideal for those recovering from ligament damage or a sprained ankle
Designed for Injury Recovery: This ankle support for ligament damage is specifically designed to aid in recovery, reducing pain and promoting healing
Breathable Material: Made from breathable fabric, our ankle brace keeps your foot cool and dry, providing maximum comfort during extended use
Lightweight and Flexible: This ankle support is lightweight and flexible, allowing for a full range of motion while still delivering necessary support
Versatile Use: Perfect for everyday wear, this ankle support for a sprained ankle can be worn during sports or while walking for enhanced safety
